CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.title: Consumables With Effects
CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.effectDescription: Describe the effect in plain language
CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.effectPlaceholder: e.g. "+10 Toughness and remove fatigued for 5 rounds" or "Heal 4 wounds and add 1 stunned"
CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.previewEmpty: Describe an effect above and click Generate to preview it.
CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.noToken: You must select a token first.
CONSUMABLE_EFFECTS.parseError: Could not parse the effect description. Try rephrasing.

showButton.name: Show Sidebar Button
showButton.hint: Show the 'Create Consumable' button in the Items Directory header.
